title: Everyday Bharat Objects — Levels 1 & 2 Combo Pack
tagline: A gift-ready journey through Indian objects, language and stories.
description: This two-level collection takes children from recognising familiar Indian objects to discovering the stories, traditions and values connected with them. It offers a richer vocabulary-building journey through culturally meaningful play.
benefits: Builds vocabulary progressively across two levels
Develops cultural awareness, classification and storytelling

comparison.format: Double-sided laminated cards with rounded corners

themesIncluded: All themes from Levels 1 and 2, including Indian homes, festivals, traditions, crafts, music, rituals, cultural symbols and values.
